summary.intent: Add Jenkins job URL to GitLab MR descriptions in release_from_fbc.py, matching the pattern used in prepare_release_konflux.py. Then create a branch, commit, push, and raise a PR to prod.
summary.outcome: Modified release_from_fbc.py to add job_url field initialization, environment variable reading, and MR description formatting. The pattern from prepare_release_konflux.py was successfully replicated across __init__, check_env_vars(), and create_shipment_mr() methods.

repo: The art-tools codebase has a consistent pattern for including Jenkins BUILD_URL in GitLab MR descriptions across pipeline files
MR descriptions follow the format 'Created by job: {url}\n\n{description}' when BUILD_URL is available

code.finding: job_url is initialized to None in __init__
job_url is populated from os.getenv('BUILD_URL') in check_env_vars()
MR description uses ternary: 'Created by job: {url}\n\n' prefix if job_url exists, else just commit_message

workflow: Pattern of examining similar code in related pipeline files to understand and replicate conventions

open_items: PR creation to prod/main was requested but not shown completed in transcript
